name: ICD-10 Diagnosis Code
summary: Detects ICD-10 diagnosis codes with context markers indicating patient data
description: Detects ICD-10 diagnosis and procedure codes in healthcare documents. Matches standard ICD-10-CM format (letter + 2 digits + optional decimal + up to 4 alphanumeric). Requires context markers to reduce false positives.

metadata.compliance_notes: Diagnosis codes linked to a patient constitute PHI under HIPAA
metadata.format: A00-Z99 with optional decimal extension (e.g., E11.65, J45.20)

effect.message: ICD-10 diagnosis code redacted per HIPAA when linked to patient identity
